summary: iter29: Verified Razorpay Subscription/AutoPay full removal — backend and frontend. All 14 backend pytests pass and every frontend surface (route, profile nav, admin UI, live-check, program detail) confirms no subscribe path remains. Free enrol + one-time Razorpay flow regressions still green.

minor.issue: Silently accepts payment_type='subscription' and persists is_subscription=true (returns 201). Per spec this is acceptable-for-legacy behaviour, but note that Pydantic Literal narrowing to ['free','one_time'] would be safer to prevent admin API callers from ever recreating a subscription-type program.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Narrow ProgramCreate.payment_type Pydantic field to Literal['free','one_time'] so /api/programs/admin returns 422 when clients (not the UI) attempt to POST payment_type='subscription'. Current behaviour silently accepts + stores is_subscription=true — legacy-safe but permissive.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/app/routes/enrolments.py: cleanly reduced to free-only enrolment. Good docstring documents the 2026-07-19 removal.

backend/app/routes/qa.py: REQUIRED_RAZORPAY_EVENTS correctly trimmed to 3. `lookback_days = max(1, min(int(lookback_days or 30), 365))` still has the same lookback_days=0 → 30 quirk from iter28 (not a blocker).

frontend/src/pages/ProgramDetail.jsx: subscription→one_time coercion at line 117 is clean; legacy programs render the standard checkout modal. Button testid used is `program-purchase-btn` (from TID constant) — the review request asked for `program-subscribe-btn` but that testid is intentionally not present since the subscribe UI was fully removed; standard purchase button covers the intent. No change needed.

frontend/src/pages/AdminPrograms.jsx: payment_type picker cleanly limited to Free + One-Time; legacy programs auto-collapse to one_time on edit (line 126); subscription_frequency stripped before submit (line 157).

frontend/src/pages/AdminLiveCheck.jsx: coverage card shows single One-Time column with 3 events (payment.captured / order.paid / payment.failed) and correctly surfaces legacy subscription.* activity_log rows under 'Other events observed' — not in the required checklist.
SubscriptionCheckoutModal.jsx and MySubscriptions.jsx are confirmed DELETED from the source tree.

/app/subscriptions route is fully unregistered — visiting it while unauthenticated falls back to the landing screen. That is the router's default catch-all behaviour (no 404 page). Acceptable per the spec.
updated_files: /app/backend/.env (RAZORPAY_MOCK_MODE flipped true→false during regression, restored to false)
test_credentials: Admin 9999999999/Admin@12345; dummy user qa-tester@example.com/tester123 (legacy email fallback login)
seed_data_creation: Test programs were created under TEST_iter29_* prefix and all soft-deleted after tests. No lingering test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Razorpay Subscription/AutoPay is fully removed from RIYORA Wellness as of iter29. Backend has 4 dead subscription endpoints (all 404), webhook coverage returns 3 one-time events only, and frontend has no subscribe UI/route/nav/admin option anywhere. Backend .env RAZORPAY_MOCK_MODE=false (restored). Note: DB collection `subscriptions` still contains legacy rows from iter27/iter28 (~5 rows for dummy user) — intentionally left alone. Admin API still silently accepts payment_type='subscription' for legacy — treated by the UI as one_time. If you need to seed a subscription-legacy program for regression, POST to /api/programs/admin with payment_type='subscription' and it will 201.
verified_flows: One-time flow (mock mode): /api/payments/order returns mock_ord_* order_id; /api/payments/verify with mock_sig_<order_id> returns purchase_id + invoice_number and persists purchase
GET /api/admin/qa/live-check/webhook-coverage returns exactly 3 required_events (payment.captured, order.paid, payment.failed), all category=one_time. 401/403 for non-admin.
POST /api/programs/admin with payment_type='free'/'one_time' → 201; payment_type='subscription' → 201 (silently accepted, is_subscription=true)
Frontend /app/subscriptions route not registered — falls back to landing/catch-all
Profile page: data-testid profile-nav-subscriptions is GONE; remaining nav items are purchases/commissions/payouts/reports/payment-history/privacy/terms/datasecurity/faq/contact
Home page featured program card renders (home-featured-program testid present)
Free program detail: program-free-enrol-btn button visible (Join for free)
One-time program detail: dummy user sees Mark as Paid (Tester) override (program-subscribe-btn absent)
Legacy subscription-type program detail: renders as one-time (Mark as Paid Tester UI, no monthly/subscribe language, no program-subscribe-btn)
Admin program builder: only admin-program-payment-type-free and admin-program-payment-type-one_time visible; admin-program-payment-type-subscription NOT rendered
Admin live-check page: 3 coverage-event-* testids, subscription.* events shown only under 'Other events observed' (from legacy activity_log rows), not in required checklist
